## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` and `pnpm format` pass locally
- [ ] The site builds locally (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] Layout works on mobile and desktop (breakpoint: `lg` / 1024px)
- [ ] Copy and content changes are intentional
- [ ] No secrets or environment files are included
